text.title: Video Prompt Engineering — Procedure
text.summary: Five steps: draft SASSCL → apply provider quirks → 5-gen eval → promote OR iterate → audit.

step.name: draft-sasscl
step.action: Fill all 6 SASSCL fields. Subject: precise description; Action: concrete verb + manner; Setting: location + time; Style + Camera + Lighting from brand_locks.

step.name: provider-quirks
step.action: Apply overlay: Runway camera vocab, Luma prose, Sora multi-stage temporal, Veo audio. Check max prompt length per provider.

step.name: five-gen-eval
step.action: Generate 5 samples. Rate each on rubric: brand adherence, prompt adherence, technical quality, motion stability, brand-style match.
step.decision-gate: If <4/5 pass — iterate prompt; do not promote (r3-five-gen-eval-gate).

step.name: promote-or-iterate
step.action: If ≥4/5: promote to production templates registry with version bump. If <4/5: tune the failing field, repeat step 3.

step.name: audit
step.action: Sample 1% of production generations weekly; re-rate; if drop below 0.8 acceptance — re-eval the template, retire if needed.
step.decision-gate: If audit fails — pause template; investigate brand-drift (fm-05) or provider regression.
